---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea to improve the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: HAliveKP

---

## 💡 Feature Description
Clear and concise description of what you want added.

## 🎯 Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be useful.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
What should be true when this feature is complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🎨 Design / Mockups
Add any mockups, wireframes, or design ideas if applicable.

## 🔄 Related Issues
Link to related issues: #123

## 👀 Possible Implementation
If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here.

## ⚠️ Breaking Changes
Will this be a breaking change?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature here.
